text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you need my report? ...My condition?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Temperature, normal. Weight, no variation.
Appetite, healthy. Training regimen proceeding
as scheduled.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
I'm on standby until my next training assignment. I
can accept any extra duties you have for me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
...Too "formal"? In that case... to summarize... I'm
fine.
